response.justification: While Bogdan possesses extensive general software development experience, strong engineering practices, and some exposure to investment practices, the resume critically lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of strong, recent C++ development experience, especially on the Windows platform. Furthermore, the required domain expertise in Fixed Income or Capital Markets is not demonstrated in conjunction with C++ development, making this a poor fit for the core requirements of the role.
strengths: Extensive overall software development experience (10+ years)
Demonstrates strong software craftsmanship and engineering practices (TDD, CI/CD)
Experience with various technologies, full-stack development, and infrastructure setup
concerns: Very limited and outdated C++ experience (approx. 6 months in 2014-2015), far below the mandatory 5-10 years
Lack of clear, substantial C++ development experience on the Windows platform
No specific Fixed Income or Capital Markets domain expertise combined with C++ development
